blocks.text: Norway owns Europe: Bodo/Glimt beat Inter, Sørloth's hat-trick
Sørloth's hat-trick and Bodo/Glimt's Inter scalp — Norway had its best European night in years. Arsenal, 5 points clear at the top, may face Leverkusen in the last 16.
🎮 Tonight 18:00 — rain (100 Thieves) vs aimclub, DraculaN Season 5
